text.title: RAG Evaluation Metrics and Thresholds
text.summary: RAGAS evaluation framework, retrieval quality metrics with production thresholds, generation quality metrics, and evaluation cadence rules.

rule.statement: Production retrieval targets: Recall@10 >0.8, MRR >0.7, NDCG >0.7. If Recall@10 is below 0.8, fix retrieval before tuning generation.
rule.rationale: Retrieval is a prerequisite for generation. If the relevant chunk is not in the top-k, no amount of prompt engineering can produce a correct answer. Retrieval failures are invisible in generation-only metrics.

rule.statement: Production generation targets (RAGAS): Faithfulness >0.9, Answer Relevancy >0.8, Context Precision >0.7, Context Recall >0.8.
rule.rationale: Faithfulness measures grounding: answers not supported by retrieved chunks are hallucinations. Answer Relevancy measures task completion. Both must be tracked independently.

rule.statement: Run RAGAS evaluation after every significant change to chunking strategy, embedding model, or retrieval parameters; do not assume changes are neutral without measurement.
rule.rationale: A chunking change that improves faithfulness may reduce context recall. Changes interact in non-obvious ways. Automated metrics catch regressions that manual testing misses.

rule.statement: Before deploying to production, run a manual evaluation of 50 representative queries across the full retrieval-generation pipeline; automated metrics miss nuanced faithfulness failures.
rule.rationale: RAGAS metrics are automated proxies. They can score a plausible but factually wrong answer as "faithful" if the wording matches retrieved context superficially. Human review catches these.

section.title: Failure Mode Diagnosis
section.p: Empty results → query too specific; use query expansion or lower score threshold. Irrelevant results → poor chunking; adjust chunk size and add overlap. Hallucinations → insufficient context; add stricter prompt constraints and more chunks. Slow queries → large index without metadata filters; pre-filter with metadata. Contradictions → outdated documents; add version control and date filtering.
